headline: Hasbro completed a registered public offering of $400 million aggregate principal amount of 4.650% senior unsecured notes due 2031.
investor_impact: This $400 million debt issuance secures medium-term financing and extends Hasbro's maturity profile to 2031 at a manageable 4.650% interest rate. The transaction represents routine balance sheet management with minimal immediate disruption to the broader investment thesis.
key_figures: 101% purchase price upon Change of Control Repurchase Event
